Hotel Room / Transport Route for a single service. Tour Package to bundle several legs (e.g. transport + hotel + return transport) into one listing — optional, not required.

Break this package down into what it bundles — e.g. outbound transport, a hotel stay, return transport. Not required: you can publish this package with just the price/capacity below and no breakdown, or add legs to show travelers exactly what's included.
